title: Eric Clapton
notes: First Dutch show in four years. Notable: 'If I Don't Be There by Morning' — first live performance since 1980.
full_description: Eric Clapton returns to the Netherlands for the first time in four years — performing at Amsterdam's sold-out Ziggo Dome with a setlist that reaches deep into his catalogue. The set includes Cream-era material, acoustic blues from Robert Johnson, and an electric set featuring Layla, Tears in Heaven, and Old Love.
ai_summary: Eric Clapton's sold-out return to Amsterdam after a four-year absence — featuring a rare deep-cuts setlist including songs not performed live since 1980, an acoustic solo segment with a Martin guitar, and a closing electric set delivered with the authority of six decades on stage.

setlist: If I Don't Be There by Morning
Nobody Knows You When You're Down and Out
